86 FUNDAMENTAL OF RAO'S SYSTEM OF NADI ASTROLOGY
Regarding Husband :
Mars is the husband of the native. Mars indicates technical line.
and is in this technical sign of his own house. Dragon Head is big
(giant). Moon is art. Hence husband has carreer connected with
Computers-technical line.

Mercury is the governing planet of education, is have interchange
with Venus and after interchange, mercury comes to his own
house virgo (Kanya)-and Virgois aspected by Jupiter and Moon.
Hence Mercury and Venus, both are aspected by Jupiter and
Moon.
Jupiter is life-Moon indicating food and liquid aspecting towards
Mercury, and Venus is also having aspect of Jupiter and Moon,
making a beautiful combination such as:-
